## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Sarah Lembcke for a Growth Lead position at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sarah has extensive experience in growth, product, and marketing across various industries and company stages](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [growthx.ai is an AI-powered growth agency transitioning into a product company, focusing on revolutionizing knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [The role involves executing zero-to-one projects across agency services, product development, and community building](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Sarah's background aligns well with growthx.ai's needs, particularly in positioning, strategy, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)

## Topics

### Sarah's Professional Background

  - [Worked with Tony Robbins at age 21-22, gaining business exposure](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - Experience as employee \#1 at a clean beauty CPG company
  - [Managed innovation teams for agencies, working with clients like Taco Bell](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Worked at 500 Global in marketing and investor relations](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Recent experience with AI/ML products at Kernel Labs venture studio](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Currently working independently with various clients on growth and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

### growthx.ai Overview

  - [AI-powered growth agency transitioning into a product company](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [Offers content marketing services (SEO, socials, editorial) to customers](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows blended with expert knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Recently raised funding (not yet public)](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Long-term vision: revolutionize knowledge work with AI-powered tools](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Potential Role and Responsibilities

  - [Execute zero-to-one projects across various domains:](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Spin up new agency service offerings (e.g., link building)](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [Develop and grow the AI-led growth community](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2877.0)
      - [Work on product development and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
      - [Assist with funding announcement and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2762.0)
  - [Flexibility to work on both agency and product sides of the business](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2183.0)

### Company Culture and Structure

  - [Small team with non-siloed approach, especially on the build side](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Currently split between delivery (client-facing) and build (internal development) teams](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)
  - [Scrappy mentality, cautious about expanding headcount without clear need](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2868.0)

### Sarah's Interests and Strengths

  - [Passionate about business growth and helping companies scale](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2355.0)
  - [Strong skills in positioning and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=3288.0)
  - [Enjoys working across various aspects of a business](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
  - [Experience in both strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=2486.0)

  - [Jason to follow up later today regarding next steps](https://fathom.video/share/q-mHJ77EshzP6p8YaRBwf86bozUp3MXw?tab=summary&timestamp=3597.0)
